{{Quote|In the battling I believe Neira Shai was slain first. His skull has carbon scoring inside an eye socket.|[[Krag Val]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''</ref>}}
'''Neira Shai''' was a warrior of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A member of [[Domain Shai]], he was dispatched by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Shedao Shai]] to [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]], along with [[Dranae Shai]], his elder cousin (and possibly his teacher) to recover the body of [[Mongei Shai]], their ancestor. Unfortunately, Bimmiel's magnetic field interfered with their search. When [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Ganner Rhysode]] came looking for members of [[Anki Pace]]'s research team, Corran Horn battled with the two in an attempt to allow Ganner to take the researchers out. Neira, hungry for battle, attacked Corran first, but Corran easily killed the young warrior by driving his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] through Neira's left eye.

==Appearances==
